title: Hadoop MapReduce Committer Stage Directory
description: The 'lib/output/committer' directory in Hadoop MapReduce is responsible for managing the commit protocol, ensuring data consistency. It contains a 'manifest' subdirectory with files like 'AbstractJobOrTaskStage.java' and 'JobOrTaskStage.java', defining stages of the process. 'LoadManifestsStage.java' processes task manifests, illustrating a layered architecture. This directory exemplifies a modular design, where each component collaborates to maintain the integrity of the commit protocol. The 'manifest' subdirectory plays a crucial role in tracking and verifying the completion of tasks, thereby ensuring reliable data processing in the MapReduce framework.
